hero.title: Conquer the
hero.desc: Step into a new fitness era at Aether, where cutting-edge technology blends with a dreamlike cosmic atmosphere to awaken the limitless potential within your body.

tech.title: Aura-Sense Technology
tech.desc: The Aura-Sense smart equipment system automatically reads your biometric data, optimizing training intensity in real time. Every movement is AI-analyzed to guarantee maximum performance.

points.title: Quantum Analysis
points.desc: Tracks 42 body metrics with absolute precision.

points.title: Titanium Equipment
points.desc: Ultra-light alloy frames sourced from aerospace engineering.

programs.title: Nebula Space Experiences
programs.subtitle: Stillness amid the galaxy — where meditation and movement merge with technology.

items.name: Zen Orbit
items.desc: Guided meditation sessions under a mesmerizing aurora light show.

items.name: Flow Nebula
items.desc: Flow yoga that connects your body's energy to the rhythm of the cosmos.

items.name: Aura Soundbath
items.desc: Sound healing therapy using singing bowls and cosmic frequencies.

membership.title: Astronaut Membership Plans
membership.subtitle: Choose the journey that fits your own conquest of the universe of strength.

testimonials.title: Astronaut Logs
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from the Aether community.

items.name: Nguyen Minh
items.quote: This space feels genuinely different. Training among the stars makes me forget fatigue and leaves me full of energy after every session.

items.name: Tran Ly
items.quote: Aura-Sense technology is a real breakthrough. I no longer have to adjust the machines myself — everything is perfectly personalized for me.

items.name: Hoang Nam
items.quote: Nebula Space is the only place I've found true peace in the middle of a bustling city. A truly premium healing experience.

contact.title: Aether Connection Station
contact.address: 52nd Floor, Bitexco Financial Tower, 02 Hai Trieu, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City
